summary: Implemented database initialization module with all 16 CREATE TABLE statements, 15 CREATE INDEX statements matching schema.sql exactly, a migration manager for schema version management, and built-in exercise seed data per PRD 5.5.
keyDecisions: All CREATE TABLE/INDEX use IF NOT EXISTS for idempotent initialization
No FOREIGN KEY constraints per design decision (application-layer integrity)
Migration version tracked in user_settings table (setting_key='schema_version')
Built-in exercises seeded only on first init (when DB has no exercises)
database.ts uses singleton pattern for DB connection and snowflake generator
SnowflakeIdGenerator interface used (not class) for type compatibility with createSnowflakeGenerator()

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: src/db/schema.ts contains all 15 CREATE TABLE statements matching schema.sql exactly
All 15 CREATE INDEX statements from schema.sql executed
src/db/migrations/ directory with migration manager that tracks schema version
Database initializes without errors on first run
Re-running initialization is idempotent (no errors, no data loss)
All column types, constraints, and defaults match er-diagram.md entity details

notes: database.ts imports expo-sqlite (native module) so it cannot be unit-tested directly in Jest; schema.ts and migration-manager.ts both have 100% coverage. Schema has 16 tables (15 from schema.sql + user_settings which was in schema.sql too - total is 16). Built-in exercises count is 21 (4+3+4+4+3+3 per PRD 5.5).
